name: competlab
description: Competitive intelligence for B2B SaaS — monitor competitors across 5 dimensions including AI Visibility (how ChatGPT, Claude, and Gemini rank your brand). 24 read-only MCP tools.
author: CompetLab

AI-generated action plans with prioritized recommendations
